title: Chore: Add Docker Compose for local development
original_text: Added Docker Compose configuration for easier local development setup. Created docker-compose.yml with services for the application, database, and cache. Added Dockerfile for the application with multi-stage build for production. Added .dockerignore to exclude unnecessary files. Updated README with Docker setup instructions. This makes it easier to spin up the full development environment. Result: docker-compose up works correctly.
expected_subject: chore(dev): add Docker Compose for local development
expected_body_lines: - Create docker-compose.yml with app, db, cache services
- Add multi-stage Dockerfile for production builds
- Update README with Docker setup instructions
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(dev): add Docker Compose for local development"
